arts.ttl: Why is Fulham vs Manchester United on at 7pm today? The reason behind the unusual kick-off time explained
arts.sum: Manchester United will look to return to winning ways in the Premier League when they visit Craven Cottage to take on Fulham this Sunday at 7pm.

arts.ttl: Napoli confirm Garnacho negotiations with Man Utd
arts.sum: However, there is a distance between Napoli and Man Utd's valuation of the player, leading the Italians to also negotiate with Borussia Dortmund's Karim Adeyemi as a backup plan for Garnacho. Napoli have confirmed that they are in talks with Manchester United over the potential signing of Alejandro Garnacho.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes reveals his reaction to Ruben Amorim's 'worst Man Utd team in history' comment
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes has responded to Ruben Amorim's recent scathing criticism of the team.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville reveals brutal way Man United players would have felt about Ruben Amorim's 'worst team in history' comments
arts.sum: Amorim came out with the comment after United suffered a seventh defeat in 15 games under their new head coach against Brighton last Sunday, before backtracking and issuing an apology.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville responds to Man Utd job demand after being told to replace Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Gary Neville has never been afraid to share his opinions of former side Manchester United and has now been told that he needs to return to Old Trafford to replace current boss Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: 'This is not sustainable' - but how bad are Man Utd's finances?
arts.sum: Manchester Untied delivered an alarming message about their finances on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Prepare Fresh Bid for Lecce Star Patrick Dorgu
arts.sum: Manchester United are reluctant to pull the brakes on their effort to sign Patrick Dorgu despite seeing their opening bid turned down by Lecce. According to Fabrizio Romano, the Red Devils will soon lodge a new offer for the sought-after youngster. The post Man Utd Prepare Fresh Bid for Lecce Star Patrick Dorgu appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Eyeing Move to Sign 'Amazing No.6' for Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Man Utd are eyeing a move to sign Sevilla star Lucien Agoume for Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: Man United captain Bruno Fernandes addresses 'worst team' suggestion by Ruben Amorim ahead of Fulham showdown
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes says that the club's players must demonstrate that they have the capabilities to represent the Red Devils during a difficult period.

arts.ttl: Man Utd set for SENSATIONAL €250m spending spree
arts.sum: “Imagine what this is for a fan of Manchester United,” Amorim said. Ruben Amorim was appointed as Man Utd manager just under three months ago, on November 1, following the sacking of Ten Hag.
